steps.title: Use the contradictory evidence
steps.content: The text says the difficulty in assigning authorship of "The Senate" comes not from too little evidence but from too much contradictory evidence. The best explanation should show that evidence can support both possible authors.

steps.title: Reject invented explanations
steps.content:
• Choice B: The text does not mention two separate versions of the essay.
  • Choice C: The text directly says lack of evidence is not the problem.
  • Choice D: The passage frames the issue as Harrington or Mercer, not as collaboration between them.
The answer is A.
